description.value: Aura moderate divination; CL 11th; Slot none; Price 39,050 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION A staff of spirit-talking is made of ebony or other dark wood, with the bones of numerous small animals dangling from it. It allows the use of the following spells: speak with animals (1 charge) speak with plants (1 charge) command plants (1 charge) commune with nature (2 charges) stone tell (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells command plants, commune with nature, speak with animals, speak with plants, stone tell; Cost 19,525 gp
